approvalSource: Steve approved Foundation-only continuation for FOUNDATION-FILE-SIZE-WATCH-CLASSIFIER-001: aim for a fresh file-size slate, split the near-5k verifier first, make yellow managed automatically with owner/threshold/next trigger, and pause after clean pushed main.
scopeSummary: Split the smallest coherent verifier slice, implement reusable file-size watch escalation, clear active file-size System Health rows, preserve managed non-blocking visibility, and close the active Current Sprint card.
constraints: Foundation-only today; no Value Builder, source/value/agent feature work, or parallel split.
Run one card only; no bundling except tiny support fixes required by proof.
Best outcome is fileSizeWatchCount=0; remaining watch must be managed, non-blocking, owner-backed, threshold-backed, next-trigger-backed, and stale-escalating.
scripts/foundation-verify.mjs defaults to split/delegate now unless proof shows wrapper-only status; do not leave it acceptable just because tests pass.
public/foundation.js, lib/foundation-db.js, and server.js can remain managed only with concrete owner, threshold, next trigger, and no new responsibility.
No broad mechanical rewrites and no new responsibility added to near-limit files.
No Drive permission mutation, email sends, Agent Feedback sends, external writes, broad extraction, provider probes, or source/value/agent work.
